# Pinporium

> Pinporium is a mobile app for enamel pin collectors: vault your collection, browse Discover and collector listings, track ISOs and grails on The Hunt, trade or sell on the Offers subtab, earn achievements, and contribute to a shared pin catalog.

- Website: https://pinporium.app
- Roadmap: https://pinporium.app/roadmap
- Changelog: https://pinporium.app/changelog
- For collectors: https://pinporium.app/for-collectors
- For artists & shops: https://pinporium.app/for-artists
- Enamel pin collection app: https://pinporium.app/enamel-pin-collection
- Pin trading: https://pinporium.app/pin-trading
- Pin wishlist (ISO / grail): https://pinporium.app/pin-wishlist
- Beta: Apply at https://pinporium.app (iOS via TestFlight, Android via Google Play internal testing after approval)
- Support: help@pinporium.app
- Privacy: https://pinporium.app/privacy
- Terms: https://pinporium.app/terms

## Product

- Platforms: iOS and Android (beta)
- Audience: Enamel pin collectors (artist pins, licensed pins, limited editions, chases, convention pickups)
- Core features: Collection vault, pin boards, shared catalog, Discover browse/search and collector listings, The Hunt (Wants / Offers / Series), collector search and public profiles, achievements and collector score, 3D pin viewer from photos

## Optional

For release history (features, improvements, fixes by version), see /changelog. For upcoming work, see /roadmap.
